mechanism: Gold's decoupling from the real-rate anchor (driven by central bank buying ~45-55% and geopolitical hedging ~15-20%) breaks the copper/gold ratio's FX-regime indicator function because gold is no longer driven by the same macro factors as copper.
regime_dependence: Breakdown persists as long as central bank buying and geopolitical hedging dominate gold pricing; could re-correlate if these structural flows normalize.
